languages.text: Да, так эффективнее подниматься по лестнице

traits.locale_text: Да, так эффективнее подниматься по лестнице

languages.text: "Ваши ощущения в пределах нормы. Операция успешна. Покиньте отсек и не мешайте работе медикариев".

traits.locale_text: "Ваши ощущения в пределах нормы. Операция успешна. Покиньте отсек и не мешайте работе медикариев".

languages.text: "The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."
languages.original_text: "Ваши ощущения в пределах нормы. Операция успешна. Покиньте отсек и не мешайте работе медикариев".

traits.locale_text: "The sensations you are experiencing are normal. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and do not interfere with the medicae's work."
"The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."
"The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."
"The sensations you are experiencing are normal. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and do not interfere with the medicae's work."

languages.text: 「いいえ、いいえ、これはあなたが受け取るべきもの、あなたの仕様通りに作られたものです。動きを2倍効率的にします！」
languages.original_text: "No, no, this is exactly what you should have received, exactly to your specifications. It makes movement twice as efficient!"

languages.text: "Yaşadığınız hisler, normal sınırlar içinde. Ameliyat başarılı oldu. Tesisi terk edin ve sıhhiye subaylarının işini aksatmayı bırakın."
languages.original_text: "The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."

traits.locale_text: "Yaşadığınız hisler, normal sınırlar içinde. Ameliyat başarılı oldu. Tesisi terk edin ve sıhhiye subaylarının işini aksatmayı bırakın."

languages.text: “你感受到的不适在正常范围内。手术很成功。请离开这里，别再干扰医务官的工作了。”
languages.original_text: "The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."

traits.locale_text: “你感受到的不适在正常范围内。手术很成功。请离开这里，别再干扰医务官的工作了。”

languages.text: "Die Empfindungen, die Ihr verspürt bewegen sich in den normalen Grenzen. Die Operation war ein Erfolg. Verlasst die Einrichtung und hört auf, die Arbeit der Medicae-Offiziere zu stören."
languages.original_text: "The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."

traits.locale_text: "Die Empfindungen, die Ihr verspürt bewegen sich in den normalen Grenzen. Die Operation war ein Erfolg. Verlasst die Einrichtung und hört auf, die Arbeit der Medicae-Offiziere zu stören."

languages.text: « Les sensations que vous éprouvez sont dans la normale. L'opération a réussi. Quittez les lieux et cessez d'importuner les officiers de medicae. »
languages.original_text: "The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."

traits.locale_text: « Les sensations que vous éprouvez sont dans la normale. L'opération a réussi. Quittez les lieux et cessez d'importuner les officiers de medicae. »

languages.text: «Las sensaciones que experimenta están dentro de los límites normales. La operación ha sido un éxito. Deje la instalación y no interfiera en la labor de los oficiales de medicae».
languages.original_text: "The sensations you are experiencing are within normal limits. The operation was a success. Leave the facility and stop disrupting the medicae officers' work."

traits.locale_text: «Las sensaciones que experimenta están dentro de los límites normales. La operación ha sido un éxito. Deje la instalación y no interfiera en la labor de los oficiales de medicae».
